2606.07001.title: DataEvolver: Automatic Data Preparation for Large Language Models through Multi-Level Self-Evolving
2606.07001.paper_summary: High-quality training data is essential to large language models (LLMs) and typically requires extensive and costly manual curation. Existing automatic data preparation methods rely on predefined pipelines or customized human instructions, which limits their adaptability to diverse data distributions and lacks principled guidance from high-quality examples. In this paper, we introduce DataEvolver, the first self-evolving data preparation system that automatically constructs pipelines to transform raw data into high-quality data. DataEvolver employs a multi-level mechanism to ensure both pipeline executability and effectiveness. At the operator level, it incrementally expands the operator set to construct a logical plan while resolving dependency conflicts. At the pipeline level, it instantiates logical plans into executable code and iteratively refines pipeline orchestration through a feedback loop that reduces the distribution gap between prepared data and high-quality examples. Experiments on seven benchmarks show that DataEvolver substantially improves data quality and achieves an average 10\% gain in downstream LLM performance compared with training on original data, highlighting new opportunities for the iterative co-evolution of LLMs and data.
2606.07001.paper_summary_zh: 高品質的訓練數據對大型語言模型（LLMs）至關重要，通常需要廣泛且昂貴的手動整理。現有的自動數據準備方法依賴於預定義的管道或定制的人類指令，這限制了它們對多樣數據分佈的適應性，並缺乏來自高品質範例的原則性指導。在本文中，我們介紹了DataEvolver，第一個自我演化的數據準備系統，能自動構建管道將原始數據轉換為高品質數據。DataEvolver採用多層機制來確保管道的可執行性和有效性。在操作符層面，它逐步擴展操作符集以構建邏輯計劃，同時解決依賴衝突。在管道層面，它將邏輯計劃實例化為可執行代碼，並通過反饋循環迭代優化管道編排，減少準備數據與高品質範例之間的分佈差距。在七個基準上的實驗顯示，DataEvolver顯著提高了數據質量，並在下游LLM性能上相比於使用原始數據訓練平均提高了10\%，突顯了LLMs和數據的迭代共同演化的新機會。
2606.07001.author: Chao Deng et.al.
2606.07001.authors: Chao Deng, Shaolei Zhang, Ju Fan, Xiaoyong Du
